robots.name: Quantum Crypto Pipeline
robots.description: random qubits → BB84 key exchange → XOR encryption. Three steps, one secure message.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Random Generator
robots.description: True quantum randomness from superposition. Password generator, dice, cards. Chi-squared test vs Math.random().
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: VQE Visualizer
robots.description: Find H2 ground state energy. 2D energy landscape heatmap, animated gradient descent, bond length potential curve.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Error Correction Sim
robots.description: 3-qubit bit-flip and phase-flip codes. Inject errors, watch syndrome detect + correct. Monte Carlo 1000-trial analysis.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: BB84 Key Distribution
robots.description: Quantum cryptography protocol. Alice sends qubits, Bob measures. Add Eve eavesdropper — see 25% error rate prove interception.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Tomography
robots.description: Reconstruct an unknown qubit state from measurements in X/Y/Z bases. See density matrix and fidelity converge.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Circuit Simulator
robots.description: Full quantum circuit editor — place H/X/Y/Z/S/T/CNOT/M gates, see state vector + probabilities. Up to 6 qubits, 100-shot sampling.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Teleportation
robots.description: Step-by-step teleportation protocol. Create Bell pair, Alice measures, Bob corrects. Full 3-qubit state vector at each step.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Deutsch-Jozsa Algorithm
robots.description: First proof of quantum speedup. Determine if f(x) is constant or balanced in ONE query vs 2^(n-1)+1. Up to 5 qubits (32 inputs).
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Bloch Sphere
robots.description: 3D qubit visualization — apply gates, see state vector + probabilities. Drag to orbit. Keyboard shortcuts for all gates.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Gates
robots.description: Interactive gate reference — matrix, Bloch rotation, before/after states, properties for 10 standard gates.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Entanglement
robots.description: Bell pair experiment with 100-shot statistics. Create, measure, see perfect correlation. Particle effects.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Grover's Search
robots.description: Amplitude amplification visualized. 2-6 qubits, adjustable target, auto-run, measurement. Classical vs quantum comparison.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: AI Quantum Tutor
robots.description: Chat with a quantum computing AI tutor. SmolLM runs in your browser via WebGPU. 11 pre-built answers as fallback.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Simon Algorithm
robots.description: Find hidden period string in O(n) quantum queries vs O(2^n) classical.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Fourier Transform
robots.description: Apply QFT, see frequency domain. Phase coloring, measurement probabilities.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Bernstein-Vazirani
robots.description: Find hidden bit string in 1 query. Classical needs N. Animated comparison.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Phase Estimation
robots.description: Estimate eigenvalue of a unitary. Precision increases with qubits. Foundation for Shor.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Superdense Coding
robots.description: Send 2 classical bits using 1 qubit + entanglement. Step-by-step protocol.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Random Walk
robots.description: Classical vs quantum walk with custom coin operators (Hadamard, Grover, custom unitary). Animated probability histograms, spreading-over-time plot, coin comparison mode.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Machine Learning
robots.description: Parameterized quantum circuit learns to classify 2D data. Variational ansatz with gradient descent, real-time decision boundary, multiple data presets.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Error Correction
robots.description: 3-qubit bit-flip, phase-flip, and Shor 9-qubit codes. Introduce errors, visualize syndrome measurement and correction step by step with ancilla qubits.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Advanced VQE
robots.description: VQE for H2, LiH, HeH+ or custom Hamiltonians. Hardware-efficient, UCCSD, and HVA ansatze. Adam/GD/SPSA optimizers, convergence plot, energy landscape, parameter trajectory.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Key Distribution
robots.description: BB84 protocol: Alice prepares qubits, Bob measures, Eve eavesdrops. Basis comparison, error rate detection, full protocol animation with qubit states.
robots.creator: serge-ivo

robots.name: Quantum Annealing
robots.description: Side-by-side classical vs quantum optimization. Draw energy landscapes, watch tunneling escape local minima. 50-trial success rate comparison.
robots.creator: serge-ivo
